name: Onion/Basl/Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Start by preparing the pasta according to package instructions.
2. Slice the onions very thinly.
3. In a deep skillet or Dutch oven, toss the onions with the olive oil over medium heat.
4. Cook the onions until they begin to get limp, stirring occasionally.
5. Lower the heat and continue cooking until the onions form a golden mass and are no longer brown, stirring periodically.
6. Add the brandy and cook for 15-20 minutes, or until all liquid has evaporated.
7. When the pasta is ready, take the basil leaves and slice them finely.
8. Mix the sliced basil into the onion sauce, adding salt and pepper to taste.
9. Toss with drained hot pasta and top with Parmesan cheese.
CAROLE TOSO (TDRH33B)
